title: prenanthes alata
intro: Prenanthes alata, also known as golden ragwort, is a flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Prenanthes alata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Prenanthes alata are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health conditions, such as colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
